focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Ron begins as an earnest, socially awkward student seeking connection through self-expression, only to be met with ridicule that foreshadows his later entanglement in Kale's unraveling world. Drawn from reluctant observer to active conspirator in a dangerous surveillance mission, he endures physical trauma and psychological disorientation, emerging weeks later—bandaged, silent, and filming—his return unsettling the fragile peace, suggesting he's no longer just a participant but consumed by the same obsessive gaze he once mocked.
